description: Production encoder. B-3 training run; locked at epoch 10. 14.4M trainable params. Frozen MoLFormer-XL (768-d drug) + ESM-2-650M (1280-d protein) backbones. Multi-task: InfoNCE + per-atom interface + 5A heavy-atom contact + affinity regression.
IDENTICAL to encoder_b3_epoch10 (same SHA256). Best-by-retrieval metric selected epoch 10 as optimal. Both filenames retained on HF for user-discovery convenience; identical content.

Target-conditioned generative decoder v0.2. 27M-param cross-attentive autoregressive transformer (6 layers, d=512, 8 heads, FFN d=2048). 50,000 training steps. MoLFormer-XL BPE tokenizer (2,362) + 1 custom [EOS] token = 2,363 vocab. bf16 mixed precision.

Training corpus metadata. pair_idx, drug_smiles, protein_id (mixed pdb:XXXX and uniprot:XXXXXX), protein_idx, cluster_id columns. 714,747 pairs across 22,964 protein clusters. Required for split-reproduction and any inference that names targets.
Train split — 592,888 pair_idx assigned to 18,372 protein clusters. Reproduced bit-exact from metadata_v3 + seed=42.
Val split (OOD) — 65,951 pair_idx assigned to 2,296 held-out protein clusters.
Test split (OOD) — 55,908 pair_idx assigned to 2,296 held-out protein clusters.

Decoder tokenizer — MoLFormer-XL BPE + custom [EOS] extension. 5 component files (tokenizer.json/vocab.json/tokenizer_config.json/special_tokens_map.json/added_tokens.json). vocab=2363; eos_token_id=2362; pad_token_id=2. Load via AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(). SHA256 is for tokenizer.json (primary load target); per-file hashes in tokenizer/dtsfm_v3_decoder/README.md.
